failure_modes.cause: Thermal degradation of TBAB or product precipitation at 120°C leading to localized solids in 0.75mm ID tubing
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement inline filtration (5um) and periodic solvent flush cycles

failure_modes.cause: High viscosity of DES (TBAB/EG) causing poor radial heat distribution despite high S/V ratio
failure_modes.mitigation: Use a high-stability oil bath or aluminum block heater with PID control

failure_modes.cause: High viscosity of DES causing inconsistent delivery at Q=3.53 mL/min
failure_modes.mitigation: Install a pulse dampener downstream of the pump

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage or seal failure leads to immediate depressurization and solvent boiling
validation_experiments: Long-term stability run (24h) at 120°C to monitor for pressure increase (dP) indicating fouling/precipitation
Viscosity-temperature profile mapping of TBAB/EG DES to verify pump delivery accuracy at 120°C
Residence time distribution (RTD) study using a tracer to confirm plug-flow behavior and absence of dead zones
